name: UniTab
description: A unique, customizable new tab page that replaces your browser's default new tab. UniTab puts a smart multi-engine search bar, live clock with contextual greetings, harmonious color palettes, locally-sourced wallpapers, and refined typography front and center — all stored locally, with zero tracking and full privacy.
short_description: A unique new tab page with multi-engine search, wallpapers, harmonious colors, and full customization.
author: Un1quer
